cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Micky Ward
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Charlene's bond with Micky evolves from initial care and dating, through conflict and rejection, to reconciliation, shared celebration of his victories, and eventual marriage.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Charlene tends to Micky's injuries and arranges a date.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Charlene marries Micky after his championship win.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hostility Towards Micky's Family
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Charlene's relationship with Micky's family escalates from tension over his training to physical confrontation and ongoing opposition, particularly towards Dicky.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Charlene causes family tension by advocating for Vegas training.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Charlene walks out of the gym after Micky reinstates Dicky, maintaining hostility.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Persistent family conflict and lack of reconciliation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Advocacy for Micky's Boxing Career
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Charlene pushes for Micky to receive paid training in Vegas, criticizes his family's interference, but loses influence when Micky chooses to work with Dicky.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Charlene advocates for professional training opportunities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Charlene removes herself from Micky's training circle after he reinstates Dicky.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether her influence will return or if Micky's career decisions will align with her wishes.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Addiction and Recovery Arc
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dicky progresses from active crack addiction, through criminal acts and arrest, to forced withdrawal in prison, and finally to committed sobriety and a sober life training fighters.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Actively addicted, hiding from family and evading detection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sober, living with family, training fighters, but battling addiction daily.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ongoing daily struggle to maintain sobriety.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Brotherly Bond Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dicky's role in Micky's life shifts from controlling trainer and cornerman, through conflict and exclusion, to mediating support for Micky's career.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Acting as Micky's coach and attempting to keep him within family influence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Accepted as a mediator and supporter, but not directly training Micky due to promises made.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Dicky can sustain his supportive role without reverting to control or conflict.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Comeback Aspirations and Prison Reflection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dicky promotes his boxing comeback and HBO documentary, reflects on his life during imprisonment, and upon release, his self-image is reinforced by family validation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Seeking to revive his boxing career and gain external recognition.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Released from prison with ego boosted by family, but his comeback plans remain unfulfilled.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The uncertain future of his HBO film and boxing return.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Path to the Title
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Micky progresses from a demoralizing loss and career hesitation to securing new management, winning key fights, and ultimately achieving his goal of becoming a world champion before retiring.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bloodied and shaken after a loss, uncertain about his boxing future.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: World champion, retired, and settled with family.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Brotherly Conflict and Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Micky's loyalty to his brother Dicky is tested through injury, blame, and exclusion, but they eventually reconcile, with Dicky returning as trainer and Micky acknowledging him as a hero.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Loyal to family, prioritizing them over career opportunities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconciled with Dicky, working together again with mutual respect.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Charlene's Support and Marriage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Micky defends his relationship with Charlene, reconnects after conflicts, and despite family tensions and temporary separations, they marry and build a life together.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In a committed relationship, facing family disapproval and tension.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Married to Charlene with a daughter, settled in Lowell.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Balancing Family and Career
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Micky repeatedly navigates choices between family loyalty and career advancement, from declining opportunities to setting conditions, ultimately finding a way to integrate family support on his own terms.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Torn between family obligations and professional boxing opportunities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Asserts control over his career while maintaining family connections, though tensions persist.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing management of family dynamics alongside career goals.
